Class ServerConnection

java.lang.Object
Networking.SocketConnection
Server.ServerConnection
public class ServerConnection extends SocketConnection
Server-side connection wrapper that extends the base SocketConnection. Handles protocol parsing and delegates to ClientHandler for business logic.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ServerConnection(Socket socket)
    Creates a new ServerConnection wrapping the given socket.

    • ServerConnection

      public ServerConnection(Socket socket) throws IOException
      Creates a new ServerConnection wrapping the given socket.
      Parameters:
      socket - the client socket to wrap
      Throws:
      IOException - if I/O streams cannot be created

      public void start()
      Description copied from class: SocketConnection
      Start receiving messages and call methods of the given handler to handle the messages. This method may only be called once.
      Overrides:
      start in class SocketConnection
